Notes: Prerequisite is satisfied on flag.campus.edu.; the UPDATE then attempts a delete_rr for an RR at noop.campus.edu. that is absent, alongside a harmless add/delete pair on probe.campus.edu. The observation query checks whether the harmless add persisted.

Steps.Description: Satisfy the prerequisite, then replay an absent-target delete_rr in the same UPDATE with unrelated add/delete operations.

Steps.Name: probe.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the harmless add/delete pair was committed despite the absent-target delete_rr.
